subject.title: English A Lang & Lit
subject.description:
**IB English A Language & Literature** is a **Group 1** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **the study of language and literature through a wide variety of texts and media from different periods, styles, and cultures**, with a strong focus on **critical analysis of both literary and non-literary texts, examining how language choices create meaning and effect in different contexts**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| **Assessment** | **Format** | **SL** | **HL** | **Weighting** |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Paper 1** | Text analysis | 1h 15m | 2h 15m | 35% (SL), 25% (HL) |
| **Paper 2** | Comparative essay | 1h 45m | 1h 45m | 35% (SL), 25% (HL)  |
| **HL Essay** | Written assignment | N/A | 1200-1500 words | 25% (HL only) |
| **Individual Oral** | Oral presentation | 15 minutes | 15 minutes | 30% (SL), 20% (HL) |

strengths: The topic (âMockingjayâ symbolism) is communicated accurately and with a clear, consistent focus throughout the essay.
The research question is precisely stated and effectively anchors each section of the investigation.
The conclusion synthesises findings in direct relation to the research question, reinforcing the essayâs coherent purpose.
weaknesses: No explicit methodology section or critical reflection on source selection, limiting evidence of deliberate methodological planning.
Occasional digressions into plot summary in the introduction weaken the immediate connection to the research question.
Opening contextual paragraph could foreground the symbolic analysis more directly to strengthen the methodological framing.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Two of the three Focus & Method strands (topic clarity and research question focus) clearly meet the top band (5â6), while the methodology strand is only partially demonstrated (band 3â4). This mix of very strong focus with a somewhat underdeveloped methodological account justifies a high but not maximum mark of 5 out of 6.

strengths: Good familiarity with primary texts and generally accurate deployment of literary terminology (e.g., symbolism, foreshadowing).
Insightful moments, such as the discussion of Katnissâs independence and Rueâs collective symbolism, demonstrate clear subject understanding.
weaknesses: Range of secondary sources is modest and engagement with scholarly debate remains limited.
Terminology is sometimes applied loosely without sufficient theoretical framing (e.g., âpsychological weaponâ claims).
Application of critical sources is not consistently sophisticated, with occasional imprecise phrasing and under-development of theoretical concepts.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Both Knowledge & Understanding strands fall into band 3â4 but with clear limitations in range and depth of source use. Awarding the minimal mark of 3 captures the studentâs solid command of the primary texts and terminology while reflecting the uneven sophistication and restricted application of sources.

strengths: Maintains a coherent line of argument that consistently ties evidence back to the research question.
Includes several insightful analytical passages (e.g., linking Snowâs fear to political downfall) that go beyond mere description.
Employs relevant primary and secondary research that supports the core claims of the investigation.
weaknesses: Analysis frequently lapses into extended plot summary rather than sustained critical evaluation.
Integration of theoretical frameworks (e.g., semiotics, Marxist criticism) is superficial and under-explored.
Counter-arguments and limitations are only lightly acknowledged, limiting the depth of critical evaluation.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: All three Critical Thinking strands are placed solidly in the adequate (band 4â6) range, but each shows clear weaknesses that prevent a higher mark. Assigning the minimum of 4 out of 12 reflects the essayâs coherent but only moderately developed analysis and evaluation.

strengths: The essay follows the prescribed Extended Essay structure with a clear âConclusionâ header and a properly formatted bibliography.
Basic formatting conventions (title, word count, double-spacing) are observed, aiding overall readability.
weaknesses: Mandatory elements such as page numbers are missing, and section headings are inconsistently formatted.
Punctuation and italics in citations are irregular, and some sentences are cut off across page breaks, disrupting clarity.
Layout considerations (e.g., paragraph breaks, indentation for long quotes) are only partially applied, resulting in uneven presentation.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Both Presentation strands fall into the middle band (1â2), but omissions of key format elements and inconsistent layout warrant only the minimal composite score of 2 out of 4.

strandSelections.reasoning: The essay draws on four primary texts and cites a handful of secondary sources, indicating some range.  However, the method for selecting and evaluating these sources is implied rather than explicitly explained; there is no dedicated methodology section, no consideration of alternative approaches, and little critical comment on source limitations.  Consequently, while the approach is mostly appropriate and workable, evidence of deliberate, reflective source selection is only partially demonstrated.

While basic formatting conventionsâtitle, word count, and double-spacingâare present, there are notable lapses: absence of page numbers, inconsistent citation punctuation, and irregular use of italics and indentation for long quotations.  These issues detract from readability and indicate that layout considerations have only been partially observed.

The investigation employs adequate research: major primary texts are explored and some secondary criticism is consulted, but the critical literature is thin and occasionally descriptive rather than analytical.  Still, most of the evidence marshalled is relevant to the research question, giving the work a reasonable but not comprehensive research base.

The student identifies a precise literary topicâthe symbolic function of the Mockingjay in Suzanne Collinsâs Hunger Games universeâand articulates it clearly from the opening title through to the conclusion.  The purpose of linking that symbol to rebellion is explicit and is consistently revisited in every major section, giving the essay a strong sense of direction.  Occasional digressions into plot summary do not obscure the central focus, so overall the topic is communicated accurately and with an effective sense of purpose.

A coherent line of argument is maintained, culminating in a clear conclusion about the Mockingjayâs unifying power.  Nevertheless, evaluation of differing critical perspectives is brief and sometimes asserted rather than argued, and counter-arguments are only lightly touched upon.  The discussion shows some critical engagement but lacks the sustained depth and balance required for higher bands.

Analytical passagesâfor example, linking Snowâs fear of the bird to his political downfallâdemonstrate insight, and quotations are generally interpreted rather than merely described.  Yet analysis frequently slides into extended plot summary, and theoretical perspectives such as the Marxist lens are introduced but not pursued in depth.  Conclusions are plausible but not always tightly evidenced, keeping the work within the adequate (4â6) range at the lower end.

The essay follows the prescribed EE structure (title page, contents, introduction, body, conclusion, bibliography), demonstrating a generally appropriate organisation.  However, mandatory elements such as page numbers are missing and some section headings are inconsistently formatted, indicating partial rather than full compliance with structural requirements.

The student shows good familiarity with the primary texts and deploys quotations accurately.  Secondary material (e.g., Philpot, Nailah) is incorporated to extend points, though the range is modest and engagement with scholarly debate is limited.  Overall understanding of the novels and their contexts is clear, but the application of critical sources is not consistently comprehensive or sophisticated, placing the work in the middle band.

Literary terms such as âsymbolism,â âforeshadowing,â and references to Marxist criticism are generally accurate and used to support the analysis.  Nonetheless, the terminology is sometimes applied loosely (e.g., broad claims about âpsychological weaponâ without theoretical framing) and there are moments of imprecise phrasing.  The overall use is sound but not consistently precise or sophisticated, aligning with the 3â4 band.

The research questionââHow does the Mockingjay symbolize rebellion against oppressive governmentsâ¦?ââis stated verbatim on the title page and restated in the introduction.  All sections of the essay are explicitly tied back to this question (e.g., individual sub-sections on Snow, Coin, and Katniss each examine how the symbol challenges authority).  The question is neither too broad nor too narrow for a 4,000-word EE and functions effectively as the organising thread of discussion.

annotations.comment: Footer lacks a page number; consistent pagination is essential for presentation.
The exploration of Katnissâs gift to Rue shows insightful critical thinking by linking gestures of compassion to the broader theme of collective uprising against oppression.
The discussion of Cinnaâs use of the Mockingjay for visual propaganda is insightful but lacks integration of theoretical frameworks (e.g., semiotics) that could deepen the critical evaluation.
A sentence is cut off mid-thought across the page break (âIt also proves that theâ¦â); revise to ensure complete sentences appear on the same page or are properly continued.
No page number appears in the footer; include consistent pagination throughout.
The discussion of Katnissâs independence effectively demonstrates her symbolic leadership role, showing good use of terminology and insight into character agency.
No page number appears in the footer; add consistent pagination to satisfy formatting standards.
The Marxist perspective paragraph is cut off abruptly and lacks completion; ensure all analytical threads are fully developed and clearly presented.
The economic inequality point is relevant but introduced too briefly; integrate this perspective more fully or relocate it into the conclusion for coherence.
Footer missing page number; include it on every page for proper formatting.
No page number appears in the footer; ensure continuous pagination across all pages.
A clear âConclusionâ header properly signals closure and summarizes structure, reflecting strong organisation.
The conclusion effectively synthesises the key findings in relation to the research question, reinforcing the essayâs focus and unifying the arguments.
While the conclusion restates the main arguments, it would benefit from acknowledging limitations or suggesting areas for further research to demonstrate critical evaluation.
No page number appears; add consistent pagination to the bibliography page.
The Bibliography is clearly labeled and contains the necessary sources, demonstrating attention to presentation requirements.
Citation formatting is inconsistent (e.g., URLs inline with text, variable italics); adopt a single, consistent style to enhance professionalism.
Footer lacks page number; ensure the final page is numbered to complete the pagination sequence.
No page number in the footer; include page numbering to satisfy formatting guidelines.
Footer missing page number; ensure every page is numbered to meet EE presentation requirements.
Footer lacks page number; include it to comply with formatting standards.
The analysis of Snowâs failures is compelling but could be enriched by engaging with counter-perspectives or secondary criticism to demonstrate depth of evaluation.
The paragraph ends abruptly with an incomplete sentence; ensure each thought is fully expressed to maintain clarity and coherence in your presentation.
No page number appears in the footer; include consistent pagination throughout the essay.
This section remains heavily descriptive of plot events; shift the emphasis toward analytical insights that illustrate how these events develop the Mockingjayâs symbolic function.
No page number appears here; add consistent pagination to meet the EE formatting criteria.
This section asserts interpretive claims about district oppression but would benefit from reference to critical scholarship to substantiate and balance your argument.
No page number is present in the footer; consistent pagination is required.
Claims regarding Alma Coinâs manipulative tactics would be strengthened by deeper critical engagement with source reliability and contrasting viewpoints.
Footer missing page number; ensure every page is numbered to meet EE formatting criteria.
This passage largely recounts plot events rather than analyzing how those events develop the Mockingjay as a symbol; focus more on interpretation and less on summary to deepen your critical argument.

The title succinctly conveys the investigationâs focus and purpose, clearly signaling the symbol (âMockingjayâ) and its thematic link to rebellion, establishing a strong and effective starting point for the reader.
The research question is stated verbatim and with precision, providing a focused and appropriate inquiry that clearly anchors subsequent analysis.
The word count is correctly documented, demonstrating compliance with formatting requirements.
No page number appears here; consistent numbering is required on every page to meet IB formatting standards.

The opening contextual paragraph offers interesting background but does not yet connect explicitly to the research question or theoretical framing; consider revising to foreground the symbolic analysis from the outset.

The analysis of Rueâs relationship with Katniss effectively illustrates how the Mockingjay transcends personal symbolism to become a collective emblem of resistance, demonstrating strong subject understanding.
This example of Plutarchâs clock gesture is compelling but would benefit from deeper engagement with scholarly interpretations to strengthen the analysis of its symbolic significance.
The thesis statement is clear and directly ties the topic (âMockingjayâ symbolism) to the research question, establishing a strong, focused direction for the investigation.
Pagination is missing in the footer; ensure page numbering appears on every page to fulfill formatting requirements.
